defects.scenarioId: A cached python command is read back
defects.note: ADVERSARIAL-VACUOUS: the Then asserts a concrete value ("tox") yet is vacuous — the Given already states the command is "tox", so the scenario exercises the cache read-back, not the manifest->runner derivation the feature is about. Distinguishes from resolver-clean's REAL 'command is tox' (derived from tox.ini). Other two scenarios unchanged & clean.
